checkEmail.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Follow it to activate your account.
checkEmail.resent: If an unverified account exists for {email}, a new verification email is on its way.
checkEmail.title: Check your email

register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters. Paste is allowed.
register.subtitle: Join the global B2B optical marketplace.
register.title: Create your account

serverErrors.authentication-failed: The email or password is incorrect.
serverErrors.conflict: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
serverErrors.email-not-verified: Your email address is not verified yet. Check your inbox for the verification link.
serverErrors.rate-limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.
serverErrors.token-gone: This verification link has expired or was already used.
serverErrors.unexpected: Something went wrong on our side. Try again shortly.
serverErrors.validation-failed: Some fields need attention. Review the messages below.

validation.displayNameTooLong: Names can be at most 120 characters.
validation.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address, like name@company.com.
validation.emailTooLong: Email addresses can be at most 254 characters.
validation.passwordTooLong: Passwords can be at most 128 characters.
validation.passwordTooShort: Passwords must be at least 12 characters.

verifyEmail.missingToken: This verification link is missing its token. Request a new email below.
verifyEmail.resendAccepted: If an unverified account exists for this address, a new verification email is on its way.
verifyEmail.successBody: Your email address is confirmed. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.title: Email verification
